commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And David reigned over all Israel; and David executed judgment and justice unto all his people. All Israel, not only over Juda. (Menochius) All the people who dwelt within the promised land, as far as the Euphrates, were forced to acknowledge his dominion. (Haydock) People, settling their differences Kings formerly performed in person, the most important office of rendering justice; whence three kings of Crete are mentioned as judges in the realms below. (Calmet) David acted with wisdom and justice. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
